description: Axiom Protocol Universal Conformance Suite — 50+ deterministic test vectors for cross-language verification

vectors.name: empty_cose
vectors.description: Empty COSE data should fail with MalformedCose

vectors.name: truncated_cose
vectors.description: Truncated COSE_Sign1 should fail

vectors.name: wrong_pubkey
vectors.description: Wrong public key should fail with InvalidSignature

vectors.name: tampered_signature_byte
vectors.description: Last byte of signature flipped

vectors.name: not_an_array
vectors.description: Empty map instead of COSE_Sign1 array

vectors.name: cbor_payload_with_null
vectors.description: CBOR payload containing null value

vectors.name: wrong_array_length
vectors.description: Array of length 3 instead of 4 for COSE_Sign1

vectors.name: duplicate_key_in_payload
vectors.description: Payload with duplicate keys (non-canonical)

vectors.name: non_canonical_uint_extra_bytes
vectors.description: Non-canonical CBOR uint using 2 bytes for value < 256

vectors.name: signature_too_short
vectors.description: Signature bstr claims 32 bytes but is actually 64 (length mismatch)

vectors.name: payload_with_float
vectors.description: Payload containing CBOR float value

vectors.name: protected_header_no_alg
vectors.description: Protected header map with no algorithm key

vectors.name: negative_predicate_value_21ff
vectors.description: Payload with negative int -1 as predicate

vectors.name: subject_too_short
vectors.description: Subject field is 16 bytes instead of 32

vectors.name: lineage_cycle_self_reference
vectors.description: Self-referencing lineage (uses own hash)

vectors.name: timestamp_overflow
vectors.description: Timestamp field is max uint64 (overflow case)

vectors.name: composite_wrong_ed_key
vectors.description: Composite with wrong Ed25519 key (all zeros)

vectors.name: composite_empty_cose
vectors.description: Empty composite COSE data

vectors.name: payload_unknown_reserved_key_50
vectors.description: Payload with key 50 (reserved, < 100) should fail

vectors.name: malformed_protected_header
vectors.description: Protected header is a bstr containing another bstr instead of a map

vectors.name: repeated_payload_key_1
vectors.description: Repeated key 1 in payload map

vectors.name: object_too_short
vectors.description: Object field is 1 byte instead of 32

vectors.name: lineage_too_short
vectors.description: Lineage field is 1 byte instead of 32

vectors.name: nonce_too_short
vectors.description: Nonce field is 1 byte instead of 32

vectors.name: payload_with_wrong_extra_field
vectors.description: Payload with key 25 (reserved, < 100) should fail

vectors.name: empty_protected_header
vectors.description: Empty bstr for protected header

vectors.name: payload_wrong_map_keys_out_of_order
vectors.description: Map keys out of order (predicate before subject)

vectors.name: cose_array_with_5_elements
vectors.description: COSE_Sign1 with 5 elements instead of 4

vectors.name: signature_all_zeros
vectors.description: Ed25519 signature is all zeros

vectors.name: pubkey_all_zeros_ed25519
vectors.description: Ed25519 pubkey is all zeros (invalid curve point)

vectors.name: missing_subject_field
vectors.description: Missing subject field in payload

vectors.name: payload_with_trailing_bytes
vectors.description: Trailing bytes after the payload

vectors.name: nonce_without_timestamp
vectors.description: Nonce present but no timestamp (nonce requires timestamp)

vectors.name: lineage_without_object
vectors.description: Lineage present but no object for DERIVED_FROM

vectors.name: predicate_too_large
vectors.description: Predicate value 8 is out of valid range (0-7)

vectors.name: cose_array_2_elements
vectors.description: COSE array with 2 elements instead of 4
